resolved risk score). The file also includes all possible Part C and Part D payment risk scores for reference purposes 
• MOFs — Each MOF is a beneficiary-level file that contains the model-specific “raw” risk scores. MOFs provide 
beneficiary specific information including demographic characteristics and the set of diseases (HCCs) included in 
that particular model. Payment years may use a blend of model risk scores, and therefore uses different MOFs as 
inputs for CMS
